title: Classic Tools
description: This Mod adds classic tools from Roblox.
body:
This mod adds some RBLX-like Classic tools.

**Which are**


Bloxy Cola

![Bloxy Cola](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d925eea96f8a7173ca7311c66c5e657ef5527b5d.png)


Speed Coil

![Speed Coil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa25b5527d73a01a0ca3e9be5b33cfe96d414288.png)


Linked Sword

![Linked Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8c10d619d8b5a030d16d5c0eb4c30f0523b6dfd.png)


Slingshot

![Slingshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/443a43ed83f55f55952d5fa392c6f3025fd53875.png)


Bloxiade

![Bloxiade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b6d77755371101c148b5ef9c67f77116598b3e4.png)
